item.description: NBC News’ Steve Kornacki breaks down primary races across Ohio and Indiana, including wins for Vivek Ramaswamy in the Republican governor’s race in Ohio and Sherrod Brown winning the Democratic Senate primary in his fight to regain the seat he lost in 2024, and how the races have been a test of the impact of nationwide redistricting efforts.

media:content.media:title: Steve Kornacki breaks down primary races in Ohio, Indiana
media:content.media:description: NBC News’ Steve Kornacki breaks down primary races across Ohio and Indiana, including wins for Vivek Ramaswamy in the Republican governor’s race in Ohio and Sherrod Brown winning the Democratic Senate primary in his fight to regain the seat he lost in 2024, and how the races have been a test of the impact of nationwide redistricting efforts.

item.title: Steve Kornacki breaks down primary races in Ohio, Indiana

item.dc:creator: Henry J. Gomez
item.description: Two hard facts hover over this year’s midterm races in Ohio.

media:content.media:text: Democratic ex-Sen. Sherrod Brown and Republican Sen. Jon Husted.
media:content.media:description: Democratic ex-Sen. Sherrod Brown and Republican Sen. Jon Husted will face off in a big general election.

media:content.media:text: Monday's Campaign Round-Up, 5.19.25: Ramaswamy’s path becomes even easier in Ohio
media:content.media:description: Democratic ex-Sen. Sherrod Brown and Republican Sen. Jon Husted will face off in a big general election.

media:content.media:text: Democratic Gubernatorial Candidate Acton Campaigns In Columbus
media:content.media:description: Democratic ex-Sen. Sherrod Brown and Republican Sen. Jon Husted will face off in a big general election.

item.title: 'Ohio is back': Both parties navigate competitive midterm races in a forgotten battleground

item.dc:creator: Henry J. Gomez
item.description: Businessman Vivek Ramaswamy has won Ohio’s Republican primary for governor, NBC News projects, advancing to what could be an expensive and competitive general election with Democrat Amy Acton in a state that has been brutal for Democrats in recent elections.

media:content.media:description: Republican Ohio gubernatorial candidate Vivek speaks during a watch party at the Spruce St. Sporting sports bar after winning the party's nomination for governor Tuesday, May 5, 2026, in Columbus.

item.title: Vivek Ramaswamy wins GOP nomination for governor in Ohio

item.dc:creator: Henry J. Gomez
item.description: Former Sen. Sherrod Brown has won the Democratic nomination in Ohio’s special Senate election, NBC News projects, paving the way for a nationally watched general election matchup against Republican incumbent Jon Husted

media:content.media:description: Democratic Ohio Senate candidate Sherrod Brown, a former three-term U.S. senator, speaks at a primary election night campaign event after winning the party's primary for US Senate in Cleveland, Tuesday, May 5, 2026.

item.title: Sherrod Brown wins Democratic Senate nomination in Ohio, setting up a key battleground race

item.dc:creator: Yuliya Talmazan
Rebecca Shabad
item.description: The ceasefire in the Middle East was in peril Tuesday after the U.S. and Iran traded fire and threats over President Donald Trump's new mission to force open the Strait of Hormuz.

media:content.media:text: Vessels in the Strait of Hormuz near Bandar Abbas, Iran
media:content.media:description: Vessels in the Strait of Hormuz near Bandar Abbas, Iran, May 4, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Defense Secretary Hegseth And Joint Chiefs Chairman Caine Brief Media At Pentagon
media:content.media:description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and the chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, Gen. Dan Caine, at the Pentagon on Tuesday.

item.title: U.S. insists Iran ceasefire not over despite attacks in Strait of Hormuz

item.description: In a newly released podcast, FBI Director Kash Patel raises criticism about law enforcement coordination in the disappearance of Nancy Guthrie, saying the FBI was kept out of the investigation for four days. NBC News’ Kelly O’Donnell reports.

media:content.media:title: FBI director slams sheriff over Nancy Guthrie case
media:content.media:description: In a newly released podcast, FBI Director Kash Patel raises criticism about law enforcement coordination in the disappearance of Nancy Guthrie, saying the FBI was kept out of the investigation for four days. NBC News’ Kelly O’Donnell reports.

item.title: FBI director slams sheriff over Nancy Guthrie case

item.description: Democrats blasted a GOP request for taxpayer money for the new White House ballroom. The White House said the public funds will only be used for secure portions of the building, and that the actual ballroom will be paid for by private donations. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

media:content.media:title: Backlash from Democrats over GOP request for taxpayer money for White House ballroom
media:content.media:description: Democrats blasted a GOP request for taxpayer money for the new White House ballroom. The White House said the public funds will only be used for secure portions of the building, and that the actual ballroom will be paid for by private donations. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

item.title: Backlash from Democrats over GOP request for taxpayer money for White House ballroom

item.dc:creator: Daniel Arkin
item.description: Newly unsealed documents in the legal battle between “It Ends With Us” co-stars Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni pull back the curtain on a monthslong courtroom clash that riveted the entertainment industry

media:content.media:description: Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni.

item.title: What unsealed court documents reveal about the Lively-Baldoni legal saga

item.description: The cruise ship where several passengers have died from the Hantavirus will head to the Canary Islands after a medical evacuation of the symptomatic people on board. NBC News’ Camila Bernal reports.

media:content.media:title: Evacuation plan for cruise ship with deadly virus on board
media:content.media:description: The cruise ship where several passengers have died from the Hantavirus will head to the Canary Islands after a medical evacuation of the symptomatic people on board. NBC News’ Camila Bernal reports.

item.title: Evacuation plan for cruise ship with deadly virus on board

item.description: Derek Merrin wins the Republican primary for Ohio's 9th Congressional District, NBC News projects. He'll take on Democratic Rep. Marcy Kaptur in a battleground race this fall.

media:content.media:title: Derek Merrin wins GOP primary for Ohio's 9th District
media:content.media:description: Derek Merrin wins the Republican primary for Ohio's 9th Congressional District, NBC News projects. He'll take on Democratic Rep. Marcy Kaptur in a battleground race this fall.

item.title: Derek Merrin wins GOP primary for Ohio's 9th District

item.title: Trump to pause 'Project Freedom'

item.description: Trump-backed Michelle Davis wins the Republican primary for Indiana state Senate District 41, NBC News projects.

media:content.media:title: Michelle Davis wins the GOP primary for Indiana state Senate
media:content.media:description: Trump-backed Michelle Davis wins the Republican primary for Indiana state Senate District 41, NBC News projects.

item.title: Michelle Davis wins the GOP primary for Indiana state Senate

item.description: Businessman Vivek Ramaswamy has won the Republican primary for Ohio governor, NBC News projects. He will face Amy Acton, a former state health director, who won the Democratic nomination without opposition, in the general election.

media:content.media:title: Vivek Ramaswamy wins the GOP primary for Ohio governor
media:content.media:description: Businessman Vivek Ramaswamy has won the Republican primary for Ohio governor, NBC News projects. He will face Amy Acton, a former state health director, who won the Democratic nomination without opposition, in the general election.

item.title: Vivek Ramaswamy wins the GOP primary for Ohio governor

item.description: Trump-endorsed Blake Fiechter wins the Republican primary for Indiana state Senate District 19, NBC News projects. He defeats state Sen. Travis Holdman, a member of party leadership.

media:content.media:title: Blake Fiechter wins GOP primary for Indiana state Senate
media:content.media:description: Trump-endorsed Blake Fiechter wins the Republican primary for Indiana state Senate District 19, NBC News projects. He defeats state Sen. Travis Holdman, a member of party leadership.

item.title: Blake Fiechter wins GOP primary for Indiana state Senate

media:content.media:description: Passengers on cruise with hantavirus to be evacuated

item.title: Passengers on cruise with hantavirus to be evacuated

item.description: NBC News' Rebecca Keegan joins "Here's the Scoop" to talk about how Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni's case raises questions of just how much public perception could be manipulated, which Lively's team has alleged that Baldoni has done to target her reputation.

media:content.media:title: Questions remain unanswered after Baldoni-Lively settlement
media:content.media:description: NBC News' Rebecca Keegan joins "Here's the Scoop" to talk about how Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni's case raises questions of just how much public perception could be manipulated, which Lively's team has alleged that Baldoni has done to target her reputation.

item.title: Questions remain unanswered after Baldoni-Lively settlement

item.description: NBC News chief data analyst Steve Kornacki breaks down real-time vote tallies from the Indiana and Ohio primaries, while giving viewers a behind-the-scenes look at election night coverage.

media:content.media:title: Kornacki Cam: Watch Steve analyze Indiana and Ohio primary results
media:content.media:description: NBC News chief data analyst Steve Kornacki breaks down real-time vote tallies from the Indiana and Ohio primaries, while giving viewers a behind-the-scenes look at election night coverage.

item.title: Kornacki Cam: Watch Steve analyze Indiana and Ohio primary results

item.dc:creator: Bridget Bowman
item.description: Democrat Chedrick Greene has won a special state Senate election in Michigan, NBC News projects, ensuring his party will keep control of the closely divided chamber.

media:content.media:text: Candidates for Michigan's 35th Senate District, Democrat Chedrick Greene, left, and Republican Jason Tunney.
media:content.media:description: Democrat Chedrick Greene, left, defeated Republican Jason Tunney in a special election for a Michigan state Senate seat.

media:content.media:text: State Capitol of Michigan in Lansing
media:content.media:description: Democrat Chedrick Greene, left, defeated Republican Jason Tunney in a special election for a Michigan state Senate seat.

item.title: Democrats keep control of Michigan state Senate after special election win
